===={{game|Red and Blue|s}}====
:''For all of Blue's teams in {{game2|Red|Green|Blue}}, see [[Blue (game)/Red, Green, and Blue|here]]''

=====Champion battle=====
Blue has one [[Full Restore]] per Pokémon, using it 12.5% of the time if their HP falls below 20%.
